name: Indian Institute of Technology Bombay
description: IIT Bombay is one of India's premier engineering institutes known for cutting-edge research, innovation, and entrepreneurship. The campus hosts a vibrant technical culture with excellent placements and global collaborations.

reviews.author: Rohan M.
reviews.text: Exceptional faculty and an amazing peer group. Placements are top tier.

reviews.author: Sneha P.
reviews.text: Campus life is intense but rewarding with tons of opportunities.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi
description: IIT Delhi is widely respected for academic excellence, startup culture, and strong industry ties. The institute consistently produces leading engineers, researchers, and entrepreneurs.

reviews.author: Ankit S.
reviews.text: Great research exposure and internship opportunities.

reviews.author: Priya K.
reviews.text: Academics are rigorous but the campus environment is fantastic.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras
description: IIT Madras is India's top-ranked engineering institute renowned for innovation, AI research, and entrepreneurship. Its lush green campus and strong alumni network make it highly sought after.

reviews.author: Vikas T.
reviews.text: The research ecosystem here is unmatched.

reviews.author: Meera R.
reviews.text: Amazing coding culture and excellent placements.

name: National Institute of Technology Trichy
description: NIT Trichy is among the best NITs in India with strong academics and excellent placement records. The institute has a vibrant technical and cultural atmosphere.

reviews.author: Rahul D.
reviews.text: Best NIT experience with strong alumni support.

reviews.author: Lavanya S.
reviews.text: Campus life and placements are both excellent.

name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani
description: BITS Pilani is known for academic flexibility, strong coding culture, and industry-oriented programs. The institute's Practice School program provides exceptional industry exposure.

reviews.author: Karan J.
reviews.text: Flexible academics and incredible startup ecosystem.

reviews.author: Neha A.
reviews.text: The PS internships are a huge advantage.

name: Vellore Institute of Technology
description: VIT offers modern infrastructure, global collaborations, and a large student community. It is especially known for strong placement opportunities in software and core engineering roles.

reviews.author: Arjun V.
reviews.text: Huge campus with great placement support.

reviews.author: Shreya N.
reviews.text: Crowded but offers plenty of opportunities.

name: Manipal Institute of Technology
description: Manipal Institute of Technology is known for its diverse student culture and industry-focused curriculum. The institute provides strong exposure through clubs, hackathons, and internships.

reviews.author: Aditi R.
reviews.text: Amazing campus life and decent placements.

reviews.author: Yash P.
reviews.text: Lots of extracurricular activities and networking.

name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology
description: SRM University has a large student ecosystem with strong emphasis on placements and international collaborations. It offers modern infrastructure and active technical communities.

reviews.author: Divya L.
reviews.text: Good placements and modern facilities.

reviews.author: Nitin B.
reviews.text: Strong coding culture with many events.

name: Delhi Technological University
description: DTU is one of India's oldest engineering colleges with strong placements and vibrant student culture. It is especially popular among students interested in software engineering and startups.

reviews.author: Ishaan K.
reviews.text: Excellent coding environment and student life.

reviews.author: Pooja G.
reviews.text: Placements are excellent for tech branches.

name: National Institute of Technology Surathkal
description: NIT Surathkal combines strong academics with one of the most scenic campuses in India. It is highly regarded for placements in both software and core sectors.

reviews.author: Manoj R.
reviews.text: Beautiful campus and strong placements.

reviews.author: Harini S.
reviews.text: Great student culture and coding community.

name: IIIT Hyderabad
description: IIIT Hyderabad is highly respected for computer science research and innovation. The institute has a rigorous curriculum and exceptional placements in AI and software engineering.

reviews.author: Tejas H.
reviews.text: The coding culture here is unreal.

reviews.author: Sana Q.
reviews.text: Excellent faculty and research opportunities.

name: Amity University Noida
description: Amity University offers a wide range of engineering and technology programs with modern infrastructure. It focuses heavily on industry exposure and extracurricular development.

reviews.author: Ritika S.
reviews.text: Good infrastructure and exposure opportunities.

reviews.author: Abhishek T.
reviews.text: Decent placements and active campus life.

name: PES University
description: PES University is known for its strong placement records and focus on software engineering. Located in Bengaluru, it benefits from close industry interaction with top tech firms.

reviews.author: Naveen P.
reviews.text: Very strong placements for CS students.

reviews.author: Keerthi M.
reviews.text: Academic workload is high but worth it.

name: Jadavpur University
description: Jadavpur University is famous for excellent ROI, academic rigor, and strong engineering placements. It attracts top recruiters while maintaining extremely affordable fees.

reviews.author: Sourav D.
reviews.text: Best ROI among engineering colleges.

reviews.author: Ananya C.
reviews.text: Strong academics with amazing placements.

name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology
description: Thapar Institute is one of India's leading private engineering colleges with a strong reputation in academics and placements. The institute offers excellent infrastructure and active industry partnerships.

reviews.author: Gurpreet S.
reviews.text: Excellent infrastructure and supportive faculty.

reviews.author: Simran K.
reviews.text: Placements are consistently good for tech branches.
